item.title: How to block Windows 10 telemetry using “hosts” file
item.description: Since Windows 8, Microsoft has moved to a new commercial strategy: in addition with traditional selling of OS licenses, started got revenues from searches, apps and games. But to do this, MS has started the collection of “telemetry” data, considered by many users as privacy-relevant. What is Windows 10 telemetry? # According with a ZDNet article: Windows 10 telemetry secrets: Where, when, and why Microsoft collects your data | ZDNet:
